question_text: Which statement correctly compares gravitational field strength on Earth and Jupiter?

options.label: A
options.text: Earth has a stronger gravitational field than Jupiter

options.label: B
options.text: Jupiter has a stronger gravitational field than Earth because it is much larger and more massive

options.label: C
options.text: Both planets have the same gravitational field strength

options.label: D
options.text: The gravitational field strength depends only on the planet's distance from the Sun

explanation: Jupiter is much larger and more massive than Earth, so it has a much stronger gravitational field. Objects experience greater gravitational pull on Jupiter, making them weigh much more there.
